nodes.name: Red-crowned malimbe
nodes.summary: Red-crowned malimbe（Malimbus coronatus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Red-crowned malimbe。

nodes.name: Red-crowned malimbe
nodes.summary: The red-crowned malimbe (Malimbus coronatus) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae (members of which are called weavers). It is found in across central Africa, in Cameroon, Central African Republic, Republic of the Congo, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Equatorial Guinea, and Gabon. It is and mostly found in the forest canopy. Due to its large range, it is classified as least concern, though the population is thought to be declining. Adult females of the species are all-black, while males have red on the crown. References External links Red-crowned malimbe – species text in Weaver Watch
